ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist's music */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "uri" TEXT /* Unique URI of the song on the streaming platform */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist(s) of the song */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the song */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source (distributor or record label) of the song */,
  "peak_rank" INTEGER /* The highest rank the song has achieved on the chart */,
  "previous_rank" INTEGER /* The rank of the song in the previous period */,
  "days_on_chart" INTEGER /* Number of days the song has been on the chart */,
  "streams" INTEGER /* Number of streams the song has received */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song (if available) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_genre_map" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (distributor or record label) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the source */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., weekly, monthly, yearly) */,
  "chart_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart entry */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chart */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the song entered the chart */,
  "entry_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the song when it entered the chart */,
  "entry_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the chart entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_entries_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_entries_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chart */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date of the historical entry */,
  "history_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the song on the historical date */,
  "history_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the historical entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_history_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_history_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streaming_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  "daily_streams" INTEGER /* Number of streams the song received on the metric date */,
  "total_streams" INTEGER /* Total number of streams the song has received */,
  "unique_listeners" INTEGER /* Number of unique listeners who streamed the song */,
  "streaming_platform" TEXT /* Streaming platform where the metric was recorded */,
  "streaming_region" TEXT /* Region where the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_metrics_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "user_preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., notification settings, dashboard layout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., song, chart) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the entity was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the entity */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location where the entity was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
